This year TraMod AWARDS 2024 focuses on “Architecture”, “Interior Architecture” and “Fashion Design & Industrial-Product Design” projects in the ‘Professional’ and “Student” categories.

The names of the jury members in the competition, including our Dean of the Faculty of Art and Design Prof. Dr. Banu Manav, are ;

Alireza Taghaboni

Gökhan Avcıoğlu

Sanjay Puri

Melike Altınışık

Reza Daneshmir

Neslihan Dostoğlu

Banu Manav

Angel Borrego Cubero

Maria Carolina Garcia

Osman Tural

Jason Carlow

Grace Ming-En Chang

Matthew Fuller

Alper Çabuk

Barbara Ebbli

Engin Kapkın

Kadir Has University Faculty of Art and Design is one of the official media partners of TraMod AWARDS 2024 organized by TraMod Academy.

For detailed information and application https://tramodacademy.com/
